description_long: This is a heavily armored combat tactical vehicle with a low, angular profile and a robust, reinforced exterior. The vehicle features a prominent turret mounted centrally on the roof, equipped with a large-caliber cannon and additional smaller weapon systems. Its hull is covered with thick, sloped armor plating, especially at the front and sides, providing enhanced protection. The vehicle rides on wide, rugged tracks partially shielded by side skirts, indicating its capability to traverse rough urban terrain. The exterior is finished in a dark, matte color scheme with no visible camouflage or military markings. The design suggests a focus on survivability and firepower in urban combat scenarios.
description: A dark, heavily armored combat vehicle with a central turret and thick, sloped armor plating, designed for urban tactical operations. It features wide tracks and a robust, angular exterior.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sloped frontal armor, central cannon, and reinforced hull with visible headlights.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the turret, cannon, and thick side skirts covering the tracks.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back armor, exhausts, and rear access panels, with no visible weaponry.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the turret, cannon, and armored side skirts.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large-caliber cannon and two smaller weapon mounts on the central turret roof; all located on the upper structure.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped armor plating on the front, sides, and rear; side skirts provide additional protection to the tracks.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid dark brown and black color scheme; no visible camouflage pattern.
